resources.string: This is used to add and sync contacts, as well as set emergency contacts for wearables and groups.

Understanding the science behind sleep, analyzing and finding poor sleeping habits and addressing the various factors that negatively impact sleep, and making timely adjustments can improve sleep quality. Huawei/Honor wearable devices scientifically assess your sleep quality and give you suggestions according to a methodology recognized by the Center for Dynamical Biomarkers (DBIOM) at BIDMC, a major teaching hospital of Harvard Medical School.
